contents: With these incredible savings, now has never been a better time to update. 1  Save time Spend 18% less time per year (4 days) on the road*. 2  Save fuel Save 12% on fuel with efficient routes*. 3  Save money Save on maintenance with less wear and tear on your Subaru*. 4  Reduce emissions Reduce your Subaru's CO2 emissions by up to 20 %*.
